failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: negative-memory synthesis constraint schedule replay over C0001 through C0003 failure ingredients before opening another major campaign
failure_asset.next_boundary: next SC0001 work must decide whether SR0002 is a meaningful non-adjacent synthesis-run hypothesis or whether SC0001 should close; do not retry SR0001 by only nudging schedule filters, daily entry count, stop, target, trail, or max-hold settings
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 8 losing folds, 1 profitable fold, negative total tick net PnL, and proxy entries per active day below the 5 to 10 target

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar schedule replay parity passed exactly, and tick execution improved total net PnL versus logic by 8.65 while still remaining negative; tick remains the economic surface.
Combining accumulated negative-memory constraints without a new edge surface did not create fold-isolated tick profitability or target activity.

hypothesis_variant.summary: derive and test non-adjacent next-hypothesis constraints from repeated tick-execution divergence, schedule replay parity lessons, and target-frequency-without-edge failures before opening another major campaign
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: first SC0001 synthesis run; it changes the operation from another entry, score, exit, or parameter variant into a constraint synthesis run over closed C0001 through C0003 evidence; it must produce a proxy plus MT5 paired evidence path for any derived trade-shape test and must not retry threshold, stop, target, trail, hold, or daily-entry nudges

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must synthesize source ingredient constraints before proposing any trade-shape test
proxy must explicitly reject adjacent retries of prior threshold, exit, score, or daily-entry tuning
proxy result cannot close or judge SR0001 without matching MT5 logic parity, MT5 tick, and execution divergence evidence
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure
repair mechanical parity before any hypothesis judgment when mismatch is found

feature.summary: closed-bar features may include failure-aware context from prior execution divergence, session gap, trade-count shift, path hazard, and target-frequency-without-edge lessons; no feature set is selected

label.summary: forward outcome or path-quality labels remain unrestricted and must be derived without freezing label shape, horizon, feature order, or model family; no label is selected

model.summary: unrestricted rule, score, model, ensemble, or direction-specific surface may be derived only after negative-memory constraints are explicit; no model family, objective, or score threshold is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery trade shape must materially differ from prior regime-response, score-ranking, and path-conditioned exit retries; proxy evidence is not a MT5 skip gate and MT5 paired validation remains mandatory
